blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 24 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,200 ft. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 20" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
